overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage set in an ancient Mediterranean harbor. A character in traditional Greek attire walks along weathered wooden fishing docks, stops to fish at the pier's end while the camera pans to reveal the coastal settlement, then returns. Bright sunlight illuminates the scene with clear blue skies and calm turquoise waters.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient fishing dock with drying racks

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wooden dock toward the open harbor

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the dock walkway with visible gaps
wooden pole structures with hanging dried fish
wooden pole structures with hanging dried fish
large wooden trireme with square sail and ornate prow
large round woven baskets stacked on the dock

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a weathered wooden dock flanked by fish drying racks. Ancient sailing ships are moored in the harbor ahead under a bright Mediterranean sun. The dock planks show signs of age and saltwater wear.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock edge overlooking harbor and coastal village

events.description: character stops walking and crouches at the dock edge to examine the water
character stands up holding a fishing spear and prepares to fish
camera pans around the stationary character to reveal stone harbor buildings and coastal cliffs

agents.ego_description: crouching at the water's edge, then standing with fishing spear while observing the harbor surroundings

entered.detail: ancient stone structures with red tiled roofs along the waterfront
elaborate wooden scaffolding and dock supports
steep rocky coastline with green vegetation
distant mountains visible across the water

segments.scene_description: At the end of the dock, the character crouches and prepares to fish. The camera rotates to reveal a panoramic view of the ancient harbor, showing stone buildings, wooden quays, and rocky cliffs surrounding the calm water. The character stands ready with a fishing spear as the view encompasses the coastal settlement.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing dock with drying racks

events.description: character stops fishing and begins walking back toward the shore along the dock

agents.ego_description: walking back along the wooden dock toward the starting point, passing the fish drying racks

entered.detail: wooden racks with hanging dried fish coming back into view
wooden racks with hanging dried fish coming back into view
woven baskets on the dock edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks back along the dock, returning toward the shore. The fish drying racks and wicker baskets come back into view as the harbor buildings recede behind. The wooden planks creak underfoot as the journey returns to the starting area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a weathered harbor dock that expands into a panoramic coastal vista before returning to the shoreline. It begins with the character walking past fish drying racks and saltwater-worn planks toward ancient sailing ships moored under a bright Mediterranean sun. As the character reaches the end of the pier and crouches to fish, the camera rotates away to reveal a wide view of stone buildings, wooden quays, and rocky cliffs surrounding the calm turquoise water. The scene then shifts back as the character stands with a fishing spear and turns around, walking back along the dock. Finally, the harbor buildings recede into the distance as the camera passes the wicker baskets and drying racks once more, returning to the starting area.
